message:
🐛 Fix System Updates to mention Marketplace-sourced components (#10418)

Update the System Updates section in Settings to acknowledge that
cards, themes, and integrations installed from the Marketplace have
independent update mechanisms managed by their publishers.

- Updated subtitle to mention Marketplace components
- Added new Marketplace Components entry in the scope info panel
  explaining that Marketplace items are updated independently
- Added corresponding i18n keys

Fixes #10414

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
